episode.title: Breaking Boundaries - Rompiendo Barreras
episode.description: Historias de Ed Dwight, el primer candidato afroamericano a astronauta, y Bequi Livingston, pionera como mujer bombera forestal

protagonists.name: Bequi Livingston
protagonists.role: Primera mujer en equipo Smokey Bear Hotshots

messages.content: En 1961, Ed Dwight fue invitado a inscribirse en un programa de entrenamiento para la NASA, la agencia espacial estadounidense. Él supo de inmediato lo que aquello significaba: nunca antes hubo un astronauta negro en los Estados Unidos.
messages.officialTranslation: In 1961, Ed Dwight was invited to enroll in a training program for NASA, the American space agency. He immediately knew what that meant: there had never been a Black astronaut in the United States before.

messages.content: If I got into that program, I could become the world's first Black astronaut!

Pero los jefes de Ed le dijeron que no se postulara. Ya era un piloto de las Fuerzas Armadas... podría llegar a ser oficial, y de los de alto rango. Sus superiores le advirtieron que unirse a la NASA sería malo para su carrera. Pero Ed decidió inscribirse de todos modos.
messages.officialTranslation: But Ed's bosses told him not to apply. He was already an Air Force pilot... he could become an officer, and a high-ranking one. His superiors warned him that joining NASA would be bad for his career. But Ed decided to enroll anyway.

messages.content: I sent my application, although I didn't think I would get into the program. But a few days later, I got a letter that said I was accepted. Soon, there was a story about me in the newspaper. And in Kansas City, the place where I'm from, they had a huge celebration for me. I was going to be the first Black man in space!

Welcome, bienvenidos y bienvenidas a 'Relatos en inglés', un podcast de Duolingo. Soy Diana Gameros. En cada episodio podrás practicar inglés a tu propio ritmo, escuchando historias reales y fascinantes.
messages.officialTranslation: Welcome to 'Stories in English', a Duolingo podcast. I'm Diana Gameros. In each episode you can practice English at your own pace, listening to real and fascinating stories.

messages.content: En los Estados Unidos hay una larga tradición de lucha por los derechos civiles, o civil rights. Y hay algo muy importante en esa lucha por la igualdad: el derecho al empleo.
messages.officialTranslation: In the United States there is a long tradition of fighting for civil rights. And there is something very important in that fight for equality: the right to employment.

keyTerms.explanation: Término clave en la historia estadounidense

messages.culturalContext: Contexto sobre el movimiento de derechos civiles en Estados Unidos
